title: About TrueTopReviews
description: Learn about our mission, our team, and how we test products.
content:
TrueTopReviews was founded with a simple mission: to help people make informed decisions about the software and services they use every day. We spend thousands of hours testing products, analyzing features, and comparing alternatives so you don't have to.

Our team of expert reviewers has deep domain expertise in cybersecurity, cloud services, and consumer software. We combine hands-on testing with rigorous methodology to produce reviews you can trust.

## Our Testing Process

Every product we review goes through a thorough evaluation process that includes:

1. **Hands-on testing** — We install, configure, and use every product extensively
2. **Objective benchmarks** — We measure speed, performance, and resource usage
3. **Feature analysis** — We evaluate every feature against real-world use cases
4. **Value assessment** — We compare pricing against features to determine value
5. **Regular updates** — We revisit reviews quarterly to ensure accuracy
